name: stat-card
title: Stat Card
author: mcpcn
description: Scrollable stat cards with values, trends, and change indicators.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with scrollable stat cards and trends
changelog.1.0.3: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.1.0.4: Fixed defensive property access to handle empty objects and null values
changelog.1.0.6: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.1.1.0: Added demo data defaults - component renders demo content when no data prop is provided
changelog.2.0.0: BREAKING: Renamed component export from Stats to StatCard and StatsProps to StatCardProps for naming consistency
